name: isMedia Co., Ltd.
summary: isMedia Co., Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells process and automatic inspection systems for compact camera module (CCM) mounted on mobile phones. The company provides 3D time of flight (ToF) test, camera module test, camera module calibration, device level camera test, and automotive camera test machines, as well as various other test machines; 3D ToF image gabber products; and imatest products solutions. It offers its products and services in China, Southeast Asia, and the Americas. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Anyang-si, South Korea.
